get.summary: Look up a contact by reference - Put on hold or replaced by a Windows Service, more suitable for the task.

post.summary: Authenticate a user and return a token
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token
Book a simple Trip with a single Passenger only, typically App Booking
post.description:
Required fields: CentralCode, FromStreet, PickupTime.
PickupTime must be UTC and no more than 10 minutes in the past.
FromZoneNo and ToZoneNo are resolved automatically from coordinates if set to 0.
On success the response body contains the same AppBook object with BookRef populated.
On failure (400/422) the response body contains an errors array.

get.summary: Get Status Information about Trip(s) - single or multiple. In case of multiple use comma to separate bookrefs
get.description:
bookRefs accepts a single reference or a comma-separated list, e.g. "ABC234" or "ABC234,CDJ678".
TripStatusCode values: 0=NotAssigned, 1=Assigned, 2=MissedTrip, 3=Done, 4=Manual, 5=Cancelled, 6=Unknown.

delete.description:
Returns 204 No Content if the trip was successfully cancelled.
Returns 422 Unprocessable Entity if the cancellation request is valid, but the trip cannot be cancelled due to business rules.The response body contains the reason.
Common rejection reasons: trip is already dispatched to a vehicle, trip is completed, or trip is under manual processing.

post.summary: Book a corporate trip (AutoBook) - typically used by Hotels and Restaurants with a fixed pickup address
post.description:
centralCode is a required query parameter (e.g. "HA").
AutoBookId identifies the corporate customer and determines the fixed pickup address stored in the system.
ToStreet, ToLat and ToLon define the destination - omit for one-way trips with no fixed destination.
PickupTime must be UTC and no more than 10 minutes in the past.
Set SMSConfirmationToCustomer to true to send an SMS to Tel on successful booking.
On success (200) the response contains BookRef.
On failure (422) the response contains ErrorMessage with the reason from the booking system.

post.summary: Book a Trip of a more Detailed Type, with Access to more Fields and more than one Passenger
post.description:
Required fields: CentralCode, and at least one Passenger with FromStreet and PickupTime.
PickupTime (on first passenger) must be UTC and no more than 10 minutes in the past.
FromZoneNo and ToZoneNo are resolved automatically from coordinates.
On success the response body contains the same Trip object with BookRef populated.
On failure (422) the response body contains an errors array.

put.summary: Change PickupTime on an existing Trip
put.description:
Required fields: CentralCode, BookRef, NewTime.
NewTime must not be more than 2 minutes in the past (local server time).
Returns 200 OK with no body on success.
Returns 422 if the booking system rejects the change (e.g. trip already dispatched).

put.summary: Assign a vehicle to a booking
put.description:
centralCode and bookRef are required query parameters.
At least one of LicenseNo or VehicleNo must be provided in the request body.
Returns 200 OK with no body on success.
Returns 422 if the booking system rejects the assignment (e.g. trip already dispatched).

Required fields: CentralCode, LicenseNo, Message.
The message is sent to the vehicle identified by LicenseNo.
ToStorage and ToPrinter are optional flags controlling message delivery.
Returns 200 OK with "Message sent successfully" on success.

get.summary: Complete Trip Data on a Booked trip
get.description:
centralCode and bookRef are required query parameters.
Returns the full Trip object including all passengers on success.
Returns 400 with no body if centralCode or bookRef is missing or unrecognized.
Returns 404 if no booking is found for the given bookRef.

get.summary: Key economic and traffic information on a trip: start, stop, km, price etc
get.description:
centralCode and bookRef are required query parameters.
Returns 404 if no receipt is found for the given bookRef.
Returns 422 with no body if the SP returns an unexpected number of rows (more than 1).
Note: response field names contain typos (SceduledPickup, BookeDateTime) – corrected in v2.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of corporate bookings based on the specified parameters

post.summary: 3 kind of TripLists based on mode: pending, finished or search based on values in TripSearch object
Registers a TT-kort control request (inserts a row in KORTKONTROLL).
post.description:
The control itself is performed asynchronously by a separate service; this endpoint only
persists the request. The result of the control is NOT returned here.
            
**Authorization:** Bearer JWT with role `2IZII` or `ALLE`, **and** a permission claim for the
target central (the `centralCode` value, e.g. `MZ`) or `ALL`. Missing role/permission → `403`.
            
**centralCode** selects the central's database (e.g. `MZ`, `TZ`). An unknown code → `400`.
            
**tilleggsdata** must be a well-formed JSON string (max 100 chars) and is stored verbatim for
the control service. Invalid JSON → `400`.
            
On success the endpoint returns **`201 Created` with an empty body** (no id is returned).
            
Example request body:
```json
{
  "centralCode": "MZ",
  "bilnr2izii": 12345,
  "sjafornr2izii": 678,
  "kortnr": "1234567890",
  "tilleggsdata": "{\"kilde\":\"2izii\"}"
}
```

201.description: Card control registered; a row was inserted in KORTKONTROLL. Empty body.

400.description: Validation failed: missing/invalid field, unknown centralCode, or tilleggsdata is not valid JSON.

403.description: Token lacks the required role (2IZII/ALLE) or permission for the central.

422.description: Request was well-formed but could not be processed — unknown vehicle (bilnr2izii) or driver (sjafornr2izii).

post.summary: Receives payment-success callback from 2izii and updates APPTRANS.

parameters.name: order_id
parameters.description: Order identifier (sendt til 2izii ved trip start, lagret som TRANSID2).

parameters.name: reference_id
parameters.description: Reference identifier fra 2izii (ny i revidert spec).

post.summary: Receives payment-cancelled callback from 2izii and updates APPTRANS.

parameters.name: order_id
parameters.description: Order identifier (sendt til 2izii ved trip start, lagret som TRANSID2).

parameters.name: reference_id
parameters.description: Reference identifier fra 2izii (ny i revidert spec).

post.summary: Get a Price Quote based on pickup and delivery
post.description:
centralCode is a required query parameter.
FromLat/FromLon and ToLat/ToLon must be valid WGS84 coordinates (not 0,0).
PickupTime must not be more than 2 minutes in the past.
On success returns Tariff (formatted string) and Price.
On failure (422) returns the same PriceQuoteResponse with ErrorMessage populated.

post.summary: Get a Price Quote for B2B based on fixed pickup and delivery

get.summary: Download shift data file for a vehicle
Get Version Number of the API
Complete List of Trip Attributes available for a Trip - For example Wheelchair, Child Seat, English speaking etc

put.summary: Registers an incoming phone call to the Booking system

get.summary: List Vehicles - parameter active: true will include all except logged out cars, active = false will include even logged out
Get VehicleNo from LicenseNo - queries Central's VOGN table

errors.description: One or more error messages describing what went wrong.

ApiErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned on 400, 422 and 500.

fromZoneNo.description: Pickup zone number. Optional - resolved automatically from FromLat/FromLon if 0.

toZoneNo.description: Destination zone number. Optional - resolved automatically from ToLat/ToLon if 0.

pickupTime.description:
Required. Scheduled pickup time in UTC.
Must be DateTime.UtcNow or later (max 10 minutes in the past allowed).
Example: 2025-06-15T14:30:00Z

bookRef.description: Response only. Booking reference assigned by the system on success.

errorMessage.description: Response only. Error message if booking failed.

AssignVehicleBody.description: Body-only portion of AssignVehicle request (CentralCode and BookRef come from query string)

attributeCode.description: Attribute code used when booking a trip.

AttributeItem.description: Trip attribute (vehicle equipment, driver skill or location property)

autoBookId.description: Required. Corporate customer ID (AutoBook). Determines the fixed pickup address.

pickupTime.description: Required. Scheduled pickup time in UTC. Must not be more than 10 minutes in the past.

orderedBy.description: Name or identifier of who ordered the trip.

messageToCar.description: Free-text message sent to the driver.

messageToBooking.description: Internal note to the booking office.

tel.description: Customer phone number. Required if SMSConfirmationToCustomer is true.

smsConfirmationToCustomer.description: If true, an SMS confirmation is sent to Tel when booking succeeds.

toLat.description: Destination latitude (WGS84). Required together with ToLon if destination is used.

toLon.description: Destination longitude (WGS84). Required together with ToLat if destination is used.

fixedPrice.description: Fixed price for the trip. 0 means no fixed price.

maxPrice.description: Maximum price the customer accepts. 0 means no limit.

prePaid.description: Set to true if the trip is prepaid.

attributes.description: Vehicle attribute codes (e.g. wheelchair, child seat). Comma-separated.

centralCode.description:
2-letter taxi central code, e.g. "MZ". Selects the central database and is stored on the row.
Required.

tilleggsdata.description:
Additional data as a JSON string. Must be well-formed JSON, max 100 chars. Stored verbatim
(column TT_JSON_TILLEGG) and consumed by the control service.
NOTE: the example below is illustrative — confirm the actual keys the control service expects.

fromLat.description: Pickup latitude. Required - must be a valid WGS84 coordinate (not 0,0).

fromLon.description: Pickup longitude. Required - must be a valid WGS84 coordinate (not 0,0).

toLat.description: Destination latitude. Required - must be a valid WGS84 coordinate (not 0,0).

toLon.description: Destination longitude. Required - must be a valid WGS84 coordinate (not 0,0).

attributes.description: Optional vehicle attribute codes (e.g. wheelchair, child seat).

pickupTime.description: Scheduled pickup time. Must not be more than 2 minutes in the past.
